overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic urban plaza in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring distinctive teal pavement, modern glass architecture, and scattered pedestrians. The camera moves steadily through the plaza past a recycling station and bench seating areas toward a street with light vehicle traffic.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic urban plaza with distinctive teal pavement. The camera moves forward past a woman in a red dress and approaches a person in a yellow jacket. A recycling station with trash bags sits in the center of the path, while modern glass buildings rise on the right and a digital billboard is visible in the distance on the left.

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the recycling station and enters a seating area featuring concrete planters with trees and yellow-green benches. Two individuals are seated on a bench to the right. The orange street light pole recedes to the left as the view opens up to show distant city buildings beyond the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza edge approaching street with vehicle traffic

agents.ego_description: walking past the seated individuals and approaching the street edge where vehicles are visible

entered.detail: green metal railings separating the plaza from the lower street level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the bench seating area where people are relaxing, approaching the edge of the plaza. Green metal railings appear on the left separating the walkway from the street below where a blue sedan is visible. The modern glass building remains prominent on the right while the view opens to the distant cityscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a futuristic urban plaza that gradually opens from a crowded pedestrian walkway into a wide vista of the surrounding cityscape. It begins on distinctive teal pavement, gliding past pedestrians in red and yellow clothing toward a central recycling station flanked by towering glass buildings and a distant digital billboard. As the camera passes the station, the environment shifts into a landscaped seating area characterized by concrete planters, trees, and yellow-green benches where people are relaxing. The scene then expands as an orange street light pole recedes to the left, leading the camera toward the edge of the plaza. Finally, the view opens completely to the distant city skyline as green metal railings appear on the left, separating the walkway from a street below where a blue sedan drives past.
